tglkmeans 0.6.1
  • Reference
  • Usage

Simulate normal data for kmeans tests

Source: R/tests.R
simulate_data.Rd

Creates nclust clusters normally distributed around 1:nclust

simulate_data(
  n = 100,
  sd = 0.3,
  nclust = 30,
  dims = 2,
  frac_na = NULL,
  add_true_clust = TRUE,
  id_column = TRUE
)

Arguments

n

number of observations per cluster

sd

sd

nclust

number of clusters

dims

number of dimensions

frac_na

fraction of NA in the first dimension

add_true_clust

add a column with the true cluster ids

id_column

add a column with the id

Value

simulated data

Examples

simulate_data(n = 100, sd = 0.3, nclust = 5, dims = 2)
#>      id        V1         V2 true_clust
#> 1     1 0.7448062 0.74360831          1
#> 2     2 0.7453152 1.23838257          1
